retrieved_result: Titanic: The final messages from a stricken ship By Sean Coughlan BBC News10 April 2012Share The Carpathia was one of the ships that received the Titanic's calls for help On the night the Titanic struck an iceberg, a network of wireless operators on ships and land stations frantically communicated

history.description: "Titanic: The final messages from a stricken ship By Sean Coughlan BBC News10 April 2012Share The Carpathia was one of the ships that received the Titanic's calls for help On the night the Titanic struck an iceberg, a network of wireless operators on ships and land stations frantically communicated
